You
1 have already
learnt
how to f
find the HCF
and LCM of two
positive
integers
using
the Fundamental
1 Theorem
 of Arithmetic in
 earlier classes, without realising
git!
This
method is also called the
 prime
factorisation method. Let us recall t
this
method
through
 an example.
